title: Parameter shadowing
body:
Public parameters in the SystemVerilog code may cause shadowing in the generated C++ code if its name happens to coincide with an autogenerated name. Obfuscating the autogenerated variable names or adding some prefix would help mitigate this issue.

The fix for one collision is at https://github.com/verilator/verilator/pull/3855.
Here's the output of the test in https://github.com/verilator/verilator/pull/3855 when using the `-Werror=shadow` flag:
```
In file included from Vt_name_collision__ALL.cpp:14:
Vt_name_collision_SubA__Nz1__Slow.cpp: In constructor ‘Vt_name_collision_SubA__Nz1::Vt_name_collision_SubA__Nz1(Vt_name_collision__Syms*, const char*)’:
Vt_name_collision_SubA__Nz1__Slow.cpp:17:106: error: declaration of ‘name’ shadows a previous local [-Werror=shadow]
 Vt_name_collision_SubA__Nz1::Vt_name_collision_SubA__Nz1(Vt_name_collision__Syms* symsp, const char* name)
                                                                                                          ^
In file included from Vt_name_collision__Syms.h:20,
                 from Vt_name_collision.cpp:5,
                 from Vt_name_collision__ALL.cpp:3:
Vt_name_collision_SubA__Nz1.h:19:35: note: shadowed declaration is here
     static constexpr CData/*1:0*/ name = 1U;
                                   ^~~~
```
code_blocks:
In file included from Vt_name_collision__ALL.cpp:14:
Vt_name_collision_SubA__Nz1__Slow.cpp: In constructor ‘Vt_name_collision_SubA__Nz1::Vt_name_collision_SubA__Nz1(Vt_name_collision__Syms*, const char*)’:
Vt_name_collision_SubA__Nz1__Slow.cpp:17:106: error: declaration of ‘name’ shadows a previous local [-Werror=shadow]
 Vt_name_collision_SubA__Nz1::Vt_name_collision_SubA__Nz1(Vt_name_collision__Syms* symsp, const char* name)
                                                                                                          ^
In file included from Vt_name_collision__Syms.h:20,
                 from Vt_name_collision.cpp:5,
                 from Vt_name_collision__ALL.cpp:3:
Vt_name_collision_SubA__Nz1.h:19:35: note: shadowed declaration is here
     static constexpr CData/*1:0*/ name = 1U;
                                   ^~~~
